nodes.text: Traveler — Level 5. You have proven you can survive. Now you must choose what kind of warrior you will become. Every faction has a Class Trainer ready to guide you. Seek them out. The path you choose now defines everything that follows.

options.text: Tell me about the class system.
Show me where the trainers are.
Accept — I'll go find a trainer.

nodes.text: There are four base classes: Enforcer (warrior/tank), Strider (agile attacker), Channeler (magic/support), and Machinist (tech/crafting). At Level 20 you unlock an Advanced branch, and at Level 40 a Master designation. Your faction's trainer will guide your choice.

options.text: I need more time to think.

nodes.text: The trainers are marked on your map. Go — the class selection screen will open when you speak with them.
Good. The world rewards those who commit to a path. Go — your trainer awaits.
Level 20 — the threshold of true specialization. Your base class has given you form. Now it gives you direction. Return to your faction's Class Trainer. They have an Advanced trial waiting for you.
The Advanced class branches deepen your chosen path. Speak with your trainer — they will assign the trial. Complete it, and choose your Advanced designation.
Good. The path is yours to walk.

Level 40. The Ascension. Most operatives never reach this point. Your Advanced class has carved a path — now the Master designation seals your legend. Find your trainer. Complete the Ascension trial. Claim what is yours.
The Master class is the pinnacle of combat development. The trial will be demanding. Your trainer will brief you on the specific requirements. Go.
Good. The path is yours to walk.
Congratulations, operative. You've reached the threshold. I am Instructor Kael — and it is time you chose your path. The Concordium recognizes four foundations of combat mastery. Choose your class.

options.text: Tell me about the available classes.
Accept the quest first, choose later.

nodes.text: Enforcer: frontline tank and damage dealer. Strider: agile striker and ranged specialist. Channeler: arcane and support caster. Machinist: gadgets, traps, and alchemy. Each branches into Advanced and Master tiers at Lv20 and Lv40.

options.text: Accept — I'll choose at the trainer later.

nodes.text: The class selection screen is open. Study your options carefully — your choice shapes every battle ahead.
Concordium discipline demands nothing less than perfection. Welcome to your new path.

options.text: I won't let the faction down.

nodes.text: Operative — the mid-zone is waiting. Get in there and clear the first wave.

Come back when you're committed to The Concordium's mission.
Good. Don't come back empty-handed.
Specific targets this time. I need two distinct variants neutralized.
Precision is the hallmark of Concordium discipline demands nothing less than perfection.. Identify and eliminate.
Come back when you're committed to The Concordium's mission.
Good. Don't come back empty-handed.
Salvage run. The mid-zone has equipment we can reclaim — if you can fight through to it.
Eight hostiles stand between us and the cache. Guard Captain needs this material.

Level 100. I have no words left that match what you've become. The Concordium was built on the idea that order and discipline could produce the greatest operative in Xylos. You are the proof. There is one final mission. It was written for you.

The Gravity Titan and the Abyss Harbinger — both at their eternal, absolute power. Enter the void. Kill them both. Recover the Eternal Crown. Come back. Nothing beyond this remains to be proven. This is eternity.

options.text: For The Concordium. For eternity. I accept.

nodes.text: Then go. The Eternal Legend of The Concordium is born the moment you walk out that door.
